record.field: HK SSL construction daily-rate structure — MPF, work-type rules, expense reimbursement.

field.name: rule_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ ref('hr_rule_rgl'), ref('hr_rule_ot'), ref('hr_rule_ovrn'), ref('hr_rule_gross'), ref('hr_rule_mpf_ee'), ref('hr_rule_mpf_er'), ref('hr_rule_expenserem'), ref('hr_rule_expense'), ref('hr_rule_net'), ])]
